DOKTER UDAH KASIH TAHU, TAPI EMAK-EMAK TETEP NGEYEL 1. Jerawat Bandel: Kurangin gula & gorengan, bukan ganti skincare jutaan. 2. Badan Gampang Loyo: Makan pisang (powerbank alami), bukan ngopi terus. 3. Sering Pusing & Lemes: Banyakin makan bayam (zat besi), bukan nambah kopi. 4. Masuk Angin Melulu: Minum teh jahe hangat, jangan cuma andelin kerokan. 5. Pusing Tanpa Sebab: Makan semangka / minum air. Ibu cuma dehidrasi. 6. Daya Tahan Drop: Makan jeruk / buah riil, bukan suplemen mahal. 7. Pikiran Mumet/Stres: Makan dark chocolate, jangan malah nyari drama baru. 8. Insomnia/Susah Tidur: Makan buah kiwi, bukan scrolling HP sampai subuh. 9. Sembelit / Susah BAB: Makan buah plum / pepaya, bukan minum obat pencahar. 10. Sendi Linu & Pegal: Minum air kunyit hangat, bukan jadi alasan rebahan seharian.

Jujur aja nih, pesona kamu tuh nyegerin banget ibarat abis pake skincare andalan di malam hari, jadi gimana, udah siap belum nerima spam notif gombalan dari aku tiap hari?

A skincare founder messaged me in February. She had one question. "Why does everyone compliment my product and then not buy it again?" She had a moisturizer. Handmade in small batches. Plant-based. No fillers, no fragrance, no anything that didn't belong. Dermatologists had tested it. Estheticians were quietly recommending it to their most sensitive-skin clients. Her repeat purchase rate was 11%. The industry average is 28%. She had spent 14 months assuming it was the price point. Then the packaging. Then the website. She redesigned all three. Twice. The repeat rate stayed at 11%. I asked to see her ads. She sent eight videos. Every single one opened on the product. Jar on a marble countertop. Lid off. Finger swirling the texture. Then a list of what was in it and what each ingredient did. Plant squalane. Ceramides. Niacinamide. Bakuchiol instead of retinol. The videos were beautiful. Genuinely beautiful. And completely forgettable. Not because the product wasn't good. Because the videos were answering a question nobody was asking. Nobody wakes up at 6am and thinks: I need to find a product with bakuchiol instead of retinol. They wake up and think: I am so tired of my skin feeling like it belongs to someone else. She was making content for the 1% of customers who research ingredients before they buy. She was ignoring the 99% who just want to feel like their skin is finally on their side. We built three videos in 5 days for $100. No jars on marble. No ingredient lists. No texture swirls. A woman at the end of a long day. Sitting on the edge of her bed. Hubungan Emosi dan Kecantikan Pernah gak kamu merasa saat sedang stres, kulit tiba-tiba kusam, muncul jerawat, atau terlihat lebih lelah? Nah Ternyata, emosi dan kecantikan saling berhubungan. Ketika kita mengalami stres berkepanjangan, tubuh melepaskan hormon kortisol yang dapat memengaruhi kondisi kulit dan tubuh. Akibatnya: ■ Kulit menjadi lebih sensitif ■ Jerawat lebih mudah muncul ■ Kulit terlihat kusam dan lelah ■ Tidur menjadi tidak berkualitas ■ Rambut lebih mudah rontok Karena itu, merawat diri tidak cukup hanya dengan skincare. Kulit yang sehat juga membutuhkan: 🌿 Pikiran yang lebih tenang 🌿 Tidur yang cukup 🌿 Mengelola emosi dengan baik 🌿 Waktu untuk beristirahat 🌿 Melakukan hal-hal yang membuat hati bahagia. Karena menjadi cantik bukan hanya tentang apa yang kamu aplikasikan ke wajah. Tetapi juga tentang bagaimana kamu memperlakukan dirimu sendiri setiap hari.
